data.body: Plan-review loop on epic adept-hedge-stain + 9 children — CONVERGED over 6 rounds. Trajectory of BLOCKs: R1=3 (A2 settled-threshold, A3 rollback, C4 Retry-After) -> R2=2 -> R3=1 (A3 git-commit, new) -> R4=0 -> R5 C4 self-inflicted BLOCK x3 (over-specified: 'delete _call_with_backoff' + 'surface RetryExhaustedError' broke 9 callers/import/__all__) -> R6=0. FINAL: all 10 PASS, 0 BLOCKs. Meaningful fixes landed: A2 COMPACTION_HORIZON_NS in HLC nanoseconds + include_retired as NEW param + cache-bypass; A3 git-aware batched commit+push + pre-tag rollback + dry-run + gh-workflow-disable pause + orphan disposition code-constant + fsutil.atomic_write; C2 corrected routing (reconstruct fields from local ticket -> standard outbound CREATE via create_one; existing action= follow-on; reverse[old_key] cleanup); C4 backed off to plan altitude (bounded backoff in live _run_acli, contract-preserving, probe-first, dead _call_with_backoff = optional cleanup); D1 fixed module attributions (ProvenanceLedger=conflict_resolver.py; census/BreakerVerdict=classify.py) + breaker-key KeyError guard + signal defs for status/tombstone/blast-radius. STOPPING JUDGMENT: residual advisories are non-meaningful — (a) review-isolation (sibling code not in main yet, e.g. A1's .retired), (b) implementation-depth (exact lock ownership, cred injection, which backoff helper — belongs in the PR), (c) DoD boilerplate. R5 proved further specificity is NEGATIVE-return (over-spec created new blockers). ATTESTATIONS: 8/10 carry a signed plan-review attestation; C1+C3 PASS with 0 advisories but attestation not persisted (the relates_to C1<->C3 link invalidates it and the CLI re-review didn't re-stamp) — verify/re-stamp at claim time.
